_meta.usage: Load when: suggesting deck direction, identifying build type

ironclad.name: Ironclad
ironclad.description: Wields powerful strikes, formidable defensive options, and draws fiendish strength from demonic benefactors. Can manipulate Exhaust.

archetypes.name: High Defense / Block
archetypes.description: Build up Block over multiple turns, potentially eliminating incoming damage. Use Body Slam for damage.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Barricade+ costs 2 energy. Prioritize Dexterity sources. Need energy generation (Offering, Bloodletting). Flame Barrier is excellent passive offense. Reaper provides healing sustain.
synergies: Exhaust synergy with Feel No Pain

archetypes.name: High Strength
archetypes.description: Increase Strength and multiply its power through multi-hit attacks or Heavy Blade.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Limit Break+ can be cast multiple times for exponential gain. Flex + Artifact keeps permanent strength. Headbutt + small deck helps replay Limit Break. Reaper becomes massive healing with high Strength.

archetypes.name: Searing Blow
archetypes.description: Upgrade Searing Blow every opportunity. Damage increases exponentially with upgrades.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Only pursue if: get it early Act 1, have 3+ campfires in Act 1 path. Keep deck small. Always upgrade at campfires. Secret Weapon finds Searing Blow.
synergies: Vulnerable is extremely valuable at high upgrades

archetypes.name: Corruption + Dead Branch
archetypes.description: Corruption makes Skills free but exhaust. Dead Branch generates replacement cards.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Feel No Pain and Juggernaut carry the deck. Seeing Red becomes free 2 energy. Fiend Fire generates many random cards. This is THE strongest Ironclad archetype when assembled.
synergies: Every Skill gives 3-4 Block from Feel No Pain

archetypes.name: Dark Embrace Combo
archetypes.description: Burn through entire deck in one turn with Corruption + Dark Embrace, then Entrench + Body Slam for lethal.
archetypes.strategy_notes: One-turn-kill combo deck. Need lots of Skills. Upgrade True Grit to avoid hitting combo pieces. Barricade allows splitting combo over turns. Remove Strikes, keep Defends.
synergies: Dual Wield or Double Tap amplify Body Slam

archetypes.name: Perfected Strike
archetypes.description: Perfected Strike gains damage for each Strike card in deck.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Deck gets heavy - need draw cards. Fire Breathing handles Wounds from Wild Strike. Only take Mark of Pain with Fire Breathing. True Grit+ helps manage status.
synergies: Dual Wield increases damage by 6 per Perfected Strike
Prayer Wheel doubles Strike card rewards

archetypes.name: Status + Evolve
archetypes.description: Use Status-generating cards with Evolve to turn drawback into advantage.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Evolve+ is high priority upgrade - increases draws instead of replacing. Fire Breathing deals 30-50 AoE damage with Status-filled hands. Mark of Pain loses its downside with Evolve.
synergies: Medical Kit lets you play Status cards
Multiple Fire Breathings for massive AoE

archetypes.name: Masochist / Rupture
archetypes.description: Self-damage triggers Rupture for permanent Strength gains.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Stack 2-3 Ruptures for faster Strength. Brutality/Combust trigger each turn. Blood for Blood becomes free quickly. Pain curse enables easy scaling. Reaper heals back the damage.
synergies: Blue Candle + Curse cards trigger Rupture

archetypes.name: Dropkick Infinite
archetypes.description: Infinite loop with Dropkick on Vulnerable enemy.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Need 2 Dropkicks OR 1 Dropkick + Dual Wield. Remove other cards aggressively. Offering+ lets you infinite with 10-card deck. Easy to assemble, very strong.
synergies: Vulnerable is required for the loop

archetypes.name: Snecko Eye
archetypes.description: High-cost cards become efficient with Snecko Eye randomization.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Only pursue after getting Snecko Eye from Act 1 boss. Dual Wield + 0-cost Bludgeons often wins fights. Perfected Strike is backup plan before Snecko Eye.

archetypes.name: Rampage
archetypes.description: Keep deck small, replay Rampage for scaling damage.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Keep deck small. Only take 1 Rampage. Avoid Status cards (Wild Strike, Immolate) unless you have Evolve+. Headbutt lets you replay Rampage faster.
synergies: Double Tap doubles damage AND scaling

silent.name: Silent
silent.description: Master of poison, shivs, and discard synergies. Excels at weakening enemies and scaling damage over time.

archetypes.name: Poison
archetypes.description: Apply Poison and let it scale. Catalyst doubles poison for massive damage.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Noxious Fumes is best early. Catalyst is win condition. Corpse Explosion handles multi-enemy fights. Don't need many poison sources - quality over quantity.

archetypes.name: Shiv
archetypes.description: Generate and play many 0-cost Shivs for damage.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Accuracy makes Shivs deal real damage. After Image gives Block per Shiv. Shuriken/Kunai/Fan synergize with many attacks. Finisher ends fights.

archetypes.name: Discard
archetypes.description: Discard cards for benefits with Tingsha, Tough Bandages, Concentrate.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Tingsha deals damage per discard. Tough Bandages give Block. Sneaky Strike is free after discarding. Hovering Kite gives energy first discard.
synergies: Calculated Gamble + Runic Pyramid draws entire deck

defect.name: Defect
defect.description: Uses Orbs (Lightning, Frost, Dark, Plasma) that provide passive effects and can be Evoked for burst damage/block.

starter_relic.name: Cracked Core
starter_relic.description: Channel 1 Lightning at start of combat

archetypes.name: Frost / Focus
archetypes.description: Stack Frost orbs and Focus for massive passive Block each turn.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Defragment is highest priority. Glacier is premium. Biased Cognition needs Orange Pellets or Artifact. Inserter doubles Orb slots over time.

archetypes.name: Lightning
archetypes.description: Channel Lightning orbs for passive damage and Evoke for burst.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Electrodynamics hits ALL enemies - amazing for multi-enemy fights. Static Discharge punishes attacks. Thunder Strike scales with Lightning played.

archetypes.name: Dark Orb
archetypes.description: Let Dark orbs charge up, then Evoke for massive single-target damage.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Dark orbs grow each turn. Position matters - Dark wants rightmost slot. Multi-Cast Evokes multiple times for burst. Good for boss fights.
synergies: Recursion cycles Dark back after Evoke
Dual Cast on charged Dark is huge

watcher.name: Watcher
watcher.description: Uses Stances (Calm, Wrath, Divinity) to amplify effects. Wrath doubles damage dealt AND taken.

starter_relic.name: Pure Water
starter_relic.description: Add Miracle to hand at start of combat

archetypes.name: Wrath Stance
archetypes.description: Enter Wrath for double damage, exit before enemy attacks.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Enter Wrath, deal damage, exit with Calm card. Taking double damage in Wrath is dangerous. Flurry of Blows replays on stance change. Violet Lotus gives energy leaving Calm.
synergies: Flurry of Blows + stance changes = many attacks

archetypes.name: Divinity
archetypes.description: Build up Mantra to 10 for Divinity stance - triple damage and +3 energy.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Divinity is extremely powerful but ends after turn. Blasphemy is risky - you die next turn. Devotion generates Mantra each turn. Plan your kill turn.
synergies: Triple damage + high strength = instant kills

archetypes.name: Retain
archetypes.description: Keep key cards between turns with Retain, set up big combos.
archetypes.strategy_notes: Establishment makes retained cards cost less. Windmill Strike grows each turn. Perseverance Block stacks. Meditate retains + enters Calm.
